query:
-- Tabela de badges disponíveis
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS badges (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  icon VARCHAR(255),
  requirement_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, -- 'lessons_completed', 'xp_earned', 'streak_days', 'course_completed'
  requirement_value INT NOT NULL,
  xp_reward INT DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Tabela de badges desbloqueados pelos usuários
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_badges (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  badge_id INT NOT NULL,
  earned_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_user_badge (user_id, badge_id)
);

-- Tabela de estatísticas dos usuários
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_stats (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  total_xp INT DEFAULT 0,
  current_level INT DEFAULT 1,
  lessons_completed INT DEFAULT 0,
  exercises_completed INT DEFAULT 0,
  current_streak INT DEFAULT 0,
  longest_streak INT DEFAULT 0,
  last_activity_date DATE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Inserir badges iniciais
INSERT INTO badges (name, description, icon, requirement_type, requirement_value, xp_reward) VALUES
('Primeira Aula', 'Complete sua primeira aula', '🎓', 'lessons_completed', 1, 50),
('Iniciante Dedicado', 'Complete 10 aulas', '📚', 'lessons_completed', 10, 100),
('Estudante Avançado', 'Complete 25 aulas', '🏆', 'lessons_completed', 25, 250),
('Mestre do Conhecimento', 'Complete todas as 27 aulas', '👑', 'lessons_completed', 27, 500),
('Primeiros Passos', 'Ganhe 100 XP', '⭐', 'xp_earned', 100, 0),
('Em Ascensão', 'Ganhe 500 XP', '🌟', 'xp_earned', 500, 0),
('Veterano', 'Ganhe 1000 XP', '💫', 'xp_earned', 1000, 0),
('Lenda', 'Ganhe 2500 XP', '✨', 'xp_earned', 2500, 0);
